name: Tabs
description: Tabs switch between related views of the same subject — a vehicle's Overview, Trips, Maintenance, and Alerts — without leaving the page. They keep peer views one click apart. karoo-ui's Tabs is a bare re-export of MUI's <Tabs> (paired with MUI's own <Tab> children) — no default-prop overrides at all, unlike most other karoo-ui wrappers.
keyRule: Use tabs for peer views of one record or population. They're not top-level navigation (that's the main navigation pattern) and not a wizard (that's a stepper). Compose <Tabs value={...} onChange={...}> with <Tab> children — Tabs itself renders only the tab bar, not the panels.

variants.name: variant="standard"
variants.whenToUse: A small, known set of tabs that fit the width (MUI default).

variants.name: variant="scrollable"
variants.whenToUse: Many tabs that overflow; pair with scrollButtons="auto" so the bar scrolls instead of wrapping.

variants.name: variant="fullWidth"
variants.whenToUse: Small views (e.g. mobile) where tabs should grow to fill the available width.

variants.name: orientation="vertical"
variants.whenToUse: A vertical tab rail alongside content instead of a horizontal bar.

variants.name: Tab with icon / label
variants.whenToUse: Reinforce a tab visually, or show a count by composing a Badge/Chip into the Tab's label node.

anatomy.name: Tabs (root)
anatomy.description: the scrollable/flex container rendering the tab bar and active indicator.

anatomy.name: Tab
anatomy.description: one selectable child (@mui/material Tab) — label, optional icon, optional disabled state.

anatomy.name: Indicator
anatomy.description: the underline marking the selected tab; MUI animates it between tabs on selection.

anatomy.name: Scroll buttons
anatomy.description: optional prev/next chevrons shown when variant="scrollable" and content overflows.

behaviors.name: Controlled selection
behaviors.description: value identifies the selected Tab (matched against each Tab's own value, or index if omitted); onChange(event, newValue) is called on selection — Tabs is always controlled, there is no internal uncontrolled state.

behaviors.name: Overflow
behaviors.description: With variant="scrollable", tabs that exceed the width scroll horizontally (or vertically with orientation="vertical") rather than wrapping.

behaviors.name: Keyboard navigation
behaviors.description: Arrow keys move focus between tabs; selectionFollowsFocus (opt-in) selects on focus instead of requiring Enter/Space.

states.treatment: textColor default 'primary' at reduced emphasis; MUI applies opacity via the Tab's own disabled/selected classes.
Primary label colour + indicatorColor="primary" underline (theme primary = semantic.color.brand.primary.main).
MUI's standard state-layer overlay; visible focus ring.
Set on the child <Tab disabled>, not on Tabs itself; dims and removes that tab from the tab order.

specs.value: 2px primary underline (MUI default), colour from indicatorColor="primary" → semantic.color.brand.primary.main

props.name: value
props.description: The value of the currently selected Tab (matched to a child Tab's own `value` prop, or its index). Pass `false` for no tab selected.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the user selects a different tab.

props.name: children
props.description: One or more @mui/material <Tab> elements (or React.Fragment-wrapped groups).

props.name: variant
props.description: standard = default sizing; scrollable = horizontally/vertically scrolling bar for overflow; fullWidth = tabs grow to fill available space (mobile).

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout flow direction of the tab bar.

props.name: scrollButtons
props.description: Whether prev/next scroll buttons show when variant="scrollable"; 'auto' shows them only when not all tabs are visible.

props.name: allowScrollButtonsMobile
props.description: Scroll buttons are hidden on mobile by default; set true to keep them.

props.name: centered
props.description: Centers the tabs; intended for large (non-scrollable) views only.

props.name: indicatorColor
props.description: Colour of the active indicator underline.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Colour applied to the Tab labels.

props.name: selectionFollowsFocus
props.description: If true, the selected tab changes as focus moves via keyboard, not only on activation.

props.name: visibleScrollbar
props.description: Shows the scrollbar (useful for a long vertical list of tabs).

props.name: action
props.description: Ref-like callback exposing updateIndicator()/updateScrollButtons() for programmatic control.

props.name: sx
props.description: Standard MUI system prop for style overrides/overrides via the theme.

doThis: Use tabs for peer views of one subject.
Reflect the active tab in the URL by deriving `value` from route state.
Use variant="scrollable" (not fullWidth hacks) once tabs overflow the available width.
dontDoThis: Don't use Tabs as primary site navigation — see the Main Navigation pattern for that.
Don't use tabs for a sequential, must-complete flow (use a Stepper).
Don't manage selection as uncontrolled state — Tabs requires a controlled `value`/`onChange` pair.
Don't overload with too many tabs — consider a different structure.
accessibility: MUI implements the tablist/tab/tabpanel ARIA pattern automatically; the selected Tab exposes aria-selected and arrow keys move between tabs.
Each Tab should be associated with its panel via aria-controls/id — Tabs/Tab don't render panels themselves, so wire this up in the consuming component.
Focus is visible; disabled tabs are removed from the tab order.

related.name: Main Navigation pattern
related.why: App-level destination switching — Tabs is for peer views within one page, not top-level nav
